rationale: No new qualitative developments affecting Romania — Iran deal uncertainty continues to weigh on energy costs, no new Black Sea or regional escalation.

top_events.title: Trump says US-Iran deal to be signed Sunday; Tehran casts doubt
top_events.summary: Unresolved Iran deal keeps energy price uncertainty alive, indirectly affecting Romanian households through gas and electricity costs.

top_events.title: Israel attacks Lebanon amid Iran deal talks
top_events.summary: Escalation in Lebanon adds Middle East instability that could affect oil prices and EU energy markets, with modest indirect impact on Romanian consumers.

top_events.title: EU migration debate: rival marches in Rome
top_events.summary: EU-wide migration policy debate continues; Romania is a transit and source country, so shifts in EU rules carry some relevance.
